text: Refunds are issued only for verified duplicate charges or documented billing errors. A refund cannot exceed the original charge.
To request a refund, support must first look up the account's invoices and confirm a duplicate or error before promising any amount.
Cancelling a plan stops future billing at the end of the current cycle. Charges billed after a confirmed cancellation date are refundable.
To export your data to CSV, open Settings, choose Data, then click Export. The CSV includes all records visible to your account.
Exports are generated asynchronously; you receive an email with a download link when the file is ready.
To change your notification email, go to Settings, then Profile, then Notifications, and update the address.
Adding a seat increases the monthly bill by the per-seat price, prorated from the day the seat was added.
A late fee of $5 applies when an invoice is unpaid past its due date. Late fees are only waived for a documented billing error.
All past invoices are listed under Billing then History, sorted by date, with a status of PAID, DUE, or REFUNDED.
Our office hours are Monday to Friday, 9am to 5pm Pacific time. Holiday schedules are posted on the status page.
The mobile app supports dark mode, which can be enabled under Settings then Appearance.
